title: ocimum centraliafricanum
intro: Ocimum centraliafricanum, also known as African Basil, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae). It is native to Central Africa and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ocimum centraliafricanum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and improve digestion, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves can also be used fresh or dried for culinary purposes.
